name: Despair Code
summary: A notion of a specific code, image, or experience that universally results in depression or even death in any human that experiences it. A form of universal mental hijacking that closely relates to simulation theory.
evidence_for: Combining the theory of “Esotericism”, in that humans have power to influence the real world through their belief and thought processes, with “Inverse Causality”, stating that the result of a situation can be the actual cause of the situation itself, and the idea of 4th dimensional travel, that being that things can exist in the future and the past, perhaps certain ideas can be manifested through belief simply because they already exist in the future and are believed to eventually exist by those in the past, and the combined belief by people in both the future and past will manifest this phenomena into reality. In other words, once humanity believes something will exist in the future, the multiple potential timelines will be eliminated, and only the timelines in which that thing exists will be created, as the belief of those in the past resonate, in a sense, with those in the future.

name: Big Soy
summary: A large theory that soy products and general societal dependance are being used to take control over large groups of the population or even all of humanity, forcing them to be dependant on those in charge.
evidence_for: The “Cosmic Censorship Pretense” theory states that phenomenal or unexplainable phenomena will try to be avoided by the universe, though perhaps this more generally implies a desire to take the path of least resistance when it comes to most situations. Combining this theory with the theory of soulless people or NPCs, perhaps due to the lack of soul in these people, the general energy of the universe will act as a stand in for a soul, and thus these people will too take the easiest paths or paths of least resistance in their lives, mimicking the universe itself.

name: Dr. Emoto’s Water Experiments
summary: A theory related to vibrational energies within the Earth, which states that water shows different characteristics in response to different stimuli, coming to the conclusion that water itself is alive.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Nephilim Earth” theory, perhaps certain water can hold a form of divinity due to its proximity to the garden of Eden within the hollow Earth, and the amount of this divinity it maintains can directly influence the water’s behavior and its health to humans.

name: Self Burying Hoses
summary: A phenomenon where hoses will bury themselves nozzle first within the Earth straight down and be unable to be retrieved easily. This phenomenon has yet to be properly explained.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Holy Water” theory, perhaps the undrinkable water that covers the Earth is evidence that the once holy and healthy water that covered our planet has been purposefully made unusable either by God himself after the flood or some other power.

name: Cigarettes Extreme Health Benefits
summary: The theory that cigarettes and other drugs are actually extremely beneficial to the human body and mind but are stigmatized to keep the population weak. This also correlates the rise of mental and physical issues with the decline of smoking.
evidence_for: Stoned Ape Theory states that ancient humans evolved by utilizing hallucinogenics to open new brain pathways. This is somewhat similar to the story of Eden where Adam & Even utilized the forbidden fruit to gain knowledge of good and evil.

name: Secret Human Organs
summary: The theory that the human body has numerous organs that are being hidden by mainstream science, as understanding and usage of these organs may lead to greater power within the general population.
evidence_for: As the “Firmament Adapted Organs” theory states, humans may have some vestigial organs that were adapted during the time spent beneath the firmament before the biblical flood, though perhaps that can be taken further and may include the idea that humans adapted or simply had organs in the garden of Eden that are now vestigial.

name: Iceberg Knowledge & Psyops
summary: The theory that icebergs and other atypical methods of communication are being utilized by those in power as psyops to misinform those who view them and lead them away from the actual truth.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Quantum Coagulation” Theory, perhaps groups of these people who have harnessed the power of their alternate reality NPC selves have come together and created a secret authoritative society that facilitates their control over all realities by putting their own NPCs, of which they hold some form of tangential influence over as in the “Quantum Puppeteering” theory, in places of power, creating an extradimensional secret society.

name: Tops Of Mountains
summary: The idea that the tops of mountains hold a form of cosmic importance, and that they can even be utilized as a way to escape our reality to a higher plane, or into other realities.
evidence_for: In medical science, one of the fundamental differences between a living and dead person is brain activity, which is measured by the electricity in the brain. If electricity is what differentiates a living person from a corpse, perhaps in the Bible when it is said that God created the first human from dust and breathed into him the breath of life, it is referring to the creation of a body then that body being granted the brain activity to be alive.

name: Organs Decalcification
summary: The practice of cleansing or decalcifying certain important organs within the human body to achieve a form of mental, physical, or spiritual enlightenment.
evidence_for: Combining the “Patents Held By Demons” theory with the “Holy Water” theory, perhaps the phenomenon of short circuiting, with electronics being ruined or damaged when water directly interacts with the circuitry, can be observed as a spiritual phenomenon, as it is remnants of divine power being used to purge the influence of demons in the technology.

name: Solar Plexus Clown Gliders
summary: A chain email that was sent in the 90s across the internet that claimed to have held a demon that could be unleashed when an attached image was viewed, or when the phrase “solar plexus clown gliders” was said.
evidence_for: Combining the “Inverse Causality Phenomena” theory with the idea of simulation theory, perhaps concepts an explanation for humans being able to control events in the future is a result of the added strain of the exponentially increasing human population. The more the simulation must strain to process all of humanity, the less power is directed toward deciding the exact future of humanity, and thus the decisions for the future are being offloaded onto the simulated minds of humans.

name: Skin Is An Alien Parasite
summary: The idea that, at the beginning of humanity, an alien lifeform bonded with the nervous and conscious systems of the human body and became one entity, and that after death, this parasite dies but the human themselves do not.
evidence_for: Continuing the “What Is Short Circuiting?” theory, if we accept that water has divine properties, then perhaps other substances that have conductive properties also have a form of divinity in them. This may be why ancient societies valued substances like gold, silver, and copper so much, not because of their malleability, but because they knew of a direct connection between these substances and God.

name: Anti Medicine
summary: The theory that most if not all modern medicine exists only to keep people weak rather than actually help or heal them
evidence_for: Perhaps the black plague’s extinction wasn’t the virus naturally dying out, but was instead done intentionally by those in power so that research could continue on the virus for it to act as a superweapon in the future. Similarly, the push toward unhealthy lifestyles in the present may be to prep our population for the next release of the black plague, thus making us far more susceptible to the disease.

name: Original Earth
summary: A biblical theory that the Earth has been created and recreated a supposedly infinite number of times. This cites the book of genesis and acts as a biblical citation for the great reset.
evidence_for: Perhaps ideas of demons granting technology to humans, as mentioned in theories like “Cruelty Advancement”, can be combined with theories of previous cycle humans having technology well beyond those who came after them.

name: Meat Stations & Meat Trading
summary: The existence of cannibal markets that operate throughout the world, and the theory that disappearances throughout the world are due to kidnappings with the end goal of selling meat to these markets.
evidence_for: If these large or small scale meat trading markets exist, then perhaps the existence of NPCs is a way to perpetuate these markets. The NPCs would exist as a form of soulless humans that can be killed and eaten supposedly without the moral dilemmas of eating actual people.

name: World Wraps
summary: The idea that the universe loops in on itself, so once one edge is reached, it simply loops back to the other edge, thus explaining the seemingly infinite size of the universe.
evidence_for: If we are being contained on Earth by aliens as some theories state, such as “Space is Fake”, then perhaps the Earth is truly flat, but the technology utilized by the aliens allows them to loop the Earth over itself in a 4th dimensional sense, so once one edge of the Earth is reached, the humans will simply be warped seamlessly to the other edge.

name: Smart Dust
summary: A theorized technology that microscopic dust could exist that could be controlled in some way to influence whatever being it is inside of. This theory states that this dust is proliferated throughout the world in diets and chemicals to enact a global control over humanity.
evidence_for: The “Memetic & Spiritual Entities” theory states that there may be life that exists in entirely non physical manners. Perhaps this idea can be combined with the “Masking Chemicals” theory to state that perhaps rather than chemicals protecting us from esoteric creatures, these non physical entities are acting as parasites that mask our presence from these entities while they feed off of us.

name: Secret Gates
summary: The general idea of gateways existing in our world that act as connections between world or dimensions, such as the top of mountains.
evidence_for: Building off the “Biblical Stoned Ape Theory”, perhaps in the early stories of Eden, the first humans existed as perfect solely spiritual entities, and the fruit opened their perception to the physical world and thus made them susceptible to death by expunging themselves from a perfect existence within the purely spiritual world. This, in a way, is the inverse of modern hallucinogens.

name: Golf Rumors
summary: The theory that golf and the PGA is used as a front for illegal activity, and that smaller scandals are created within the golf community to point attention away from larger events.
evidence_for: If we combine concepts of “Cloning” with modern entertainment, perhaps many modern actors are actually clones that were created specifically for acting and nothing else. This may explain why large media companies enjoy utilizing the same few actors so often, not for name recognition, but because they know these people are actually clones that pose no risk.

name: Robert Golf And The Glass Camera
summary: A theorized technology that would utilize astral projection as a form of surveillance. Supposedly, testing with this theory led to the death of its only participant, and supposed footage of heaven being captured.
evidence_for: The “Noosphere Surveillance” theory states that the government may be utilizing demons to monitor humanity’s collective consciousness through the noosphere, though this may not have always been the case. The government’s experiments with Robert Golf may have been an attempt to harness some form of control over the noosphere by humanity, though he became too entrenched within the realm after spending too long within it, thus making him susceptible to demonic influence.

name: Pyramids Built By The Templars Order
summary: The theory that the freemasons constructed the pyramids either using ancient technology from previous cycles of humanity, or the pyramids existed from the previous cycles of humanity, and are controlled by the freemasons.
evidence_for: If we combine hollow earth/cavern related theories with the phenomena of massive urban centers, perhaps we can see that these large cities are built on entrances into the hollow Earth, likely to make transportation of large amounts of kidnapped people easier, which would also explain why the “Sinkholes” theory claims that sinkholes appear mostly in major cities and heavily populated areas, as the earth beneath his hollow. The same may apply to even early human settlements like mesopotamia, as perhaps these ancient cities are the results of ancient humans arising from the hollow Earth to settle the outer Earth, with records of this event having long since been lost or hidden.

name: Endless Elevators
summary: An urban phenomenon where elevator shafts appear to extend downward well in excess of the building’s actual floors, theorized to be entrances into the hollow earth caverns.
evidence_for: Applying “Retrocausality” to the “Tunnel Cities” theory, perhaps humans aren’t creating structures on entrances to the hollow Earth intentionally, but it is instead an unintentional instinct, or a leyline of sorts. This may imply a form of unknown survival mechanism built into humans, that being that we will seek the hollow Earth if some form of catastrophic events occurs.

name: Divinities Playing Card Game
summary: The concept of every religion having some truth to it, and that the deities of each religion all exist and are utilizing humanity for their entertainment.
evidence_for: Continuing the “The Inverted Empire” theory, perhaps the goal of maintaining two independent humanities is not universal, and that there are some who wish to exploit the technological supremacy of the hollow Earth empire. This may explain theories like “Panurgic Men” or even “Giants” as rogue actors coming to the outer Earth to exploit its lesser people, as they know the hollow Earth empire can’t openly reveal itself to remove them without severe consequences.

name: Regurgitation Rituals
summary: An old world belief of regurgitation being used as a form of cleansing one’s body and spirit and gaining power from whatever was regurgitated. This further states that missing people are used in these rituals by the elite, as humans would hold more power than regular foods.
evidence_for: If power can be granted be consuming substances then regurgitating it, perhaps things like food or other living/once living things have some form of non physical energy that humans need to survive, and that this energy is is harvested from the things we consume by our bodies before the actual thing we consumed is. This would explain the ideas of “Regurgitation Rituals” as humans harvesting the non physical energy of the things they eat then removing the food before whatever impure effects it may have on the body take hold.

name: Hook Operators
summary: A concept that most people are entirely soulless and incapable of making decisions on their own, and instead are controlled by operators, which are people who can psychically influence others to their will.
evidence_for: Combining the “True State Magic” or “Occult Airports” theories with the “Fluoride Is Water Poison” theories, perhaps the subtle influence occurring within people at city centers or airports is literally stealing energy from one’s soul. This may explain the homogenous nature of cities, as the souls of people are being stolen en masse.

name: Regenerative Death Consumption
summary: Similar to the Regurgitation Rituals theory, this theory states that consuming the corpse of a person soon after their death will allow a person to gain their power, remaining lifespan, and/or energy.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Energy Siphoning” theory, if humans can siphon non physical energy from the things they consume, perhaps through meditation or other spiritual practices, this ability can be exerted externally.

name: Chakra Removal
summary: The theory that the chakra, or soul, of a person can be removed by certain means, and thus can be replaced by whatever the remover desires, acting as a form of subtle or non subtle mind control.
evidence_for: If we accept that there is not only an end goal that humans must strive to reach in a spiritual sense, as well as accepting that there are forces in this world that will attempt to facilitate or hinder this ascension, both of which are very common beliefs in religion, then perhaps once a soul has become so fully hardened toward ascensionism or the refusal of ascensionism, then these forces, whether they be angels, demons, or other entities, will abandon these souls in a sense, as their influence can no longer hold any possible weight.

name: Sexual/Erotic Energy
summary: The idea that libido in humans gives off a tangible energy that can be utilized by humans if not wasted, and may have influence on things in the real world if utilized correctly.
evidence_for: If we take the concept of “Retrocausality” from things like simulation theory and apply it to religious beliefs of humans being tasked with toiling on the Earth, particularly in the book of Genesis where it is a punishment for their original sin. Perhaps then, when we forfeit ourselves to our base desires like animals, then we also forfeit the task with which we have been given.

name: Trees Are Mammals
summary: The idea that trees are an ancient evolutionary ancestor of humans, and that they simply took a different evolutionary path. This may further imply the ability to talk to certain flora.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Mundane Reincarnation” theory and the “Fauna To Flora Soul Transference”, perhaps elites are attempting to create a form of perfect vessel that can take on any soul, no matter how weak. This could create a form of immortality for those who have access to these entities, as no matter how weak their soul is from their bad deeds in life, they can always be reincarnated into their chosen vessel.

name: The Math Vault Of Trinidad
summary: Inside a cavern on the island of Trinidad is a locked vault with seemingly nonsensical mathematical equations carved into it. The theory states that these equations are divine, and if the proper person looks at them, they will be able to solve the problem, and thus unlock the vault.
evidence_for: The “5th Dimensional Psychic Resonance” theory states that the mind or soul emits a form of energy that transcends time itself. If we combine this with theories such as the “Aura Noise” theory, which states that we can perceive the energies of things around us, even if subconsciously, perhaps we can understand things like divination or simple bad feelings about certain things as our souls perceiving the energy of whatever occurred in a future timeline and transmitting it back to our present self.

name: Entity Merging
summary: A concept that if two entities are close enough in identity, they can become interlinked. The entities can exist in different spaces, times, or even dimensions, though still become linked, granting a theoretical power to anyone who could achieve such a phenomenon
evidence_for: In coding, there is a distinct difference between the ‘address’ of a certain object and the object itself, with references to the object able to be made that take information from the object, but do not alter the object itself. Perhaps, if we believe in the idea of multiple universes souls work in a similar way, with there being one single soul that exists in a higher plane, with each of the potentially infinite physical forms of that person each deriving information from the soul to act according to the nature of the soul.

name: Inside Out Earth
summary: The idea that the Earth is a sphere, but we exist inside this sphere, and that the blue sky is actually the other side of the Earth.
evidence_for: As the Bible states, there is a firmament to separate the waters of the Earth from the waters above the Earth, though it is widely believed that this firmament was collapsed to cause the flood mentioned in Genesis. Though, perhaps this belief is false, and what we know as space is just another instance of water akin to the ocean.

name: Human Biocapital
summary: The idea that the production of humans is an economic driver, even if secretly, in some governments across the world, and that missing people are being sold on these markets.
evidence_for: If we accept that idea that there is a higher purpose for every soul, that being a form of ascensionism, then perhaps we can derive that ideas like reincarnation do not cease even if this ascension is reached. Thusly, we can see that every soul has a set number of bodies it will reincarnate into, and perhaps if a body that was laid out for another soul can not be granted its soul, due to this soul having ascended in a previous lifetime, it will be a living, yet soulless, person, or an NPC.

name: TGA Greyspacing
summary: Transient Global Amnesia is the notion that large groups of the population have forgotten major historical events, whereas this theory states that the government of certain nations have forced their populations to forget massive events through things like media or other forms of control.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Infinite Bodies, One Soul” theory, if we observe that the only real influence a person has on the world is through the influence of their soul, then perhaps if their soul can be expunged in its entirety, through certain theories like “Urban Soul Stealing”, their influence would also be expunged. Combining this with the “5th Dimensional Psychic Resonance” theory, which states that the mind or soul emits a form of energy that transcends time, and the “Spirit Perception” theory, which states that we perceive the world through energies, perhaps if a soul is entirely expunged, they will, in a sense, be erased from all of reality, past and future.

name: The Ocean At Night
summary: In 2010, a project was carried out by governments to use the ocean as a cooling source for a massive power generator. Doing so supposedly awoke a massive sea creature that then required many world navies to deal with.
evidence_for: Combining the “Pelagic Giants” theory with the “Nephilim Earth” theory, perhaps certain sea monsters are actually angels that are protecting the garden of Eden within the hollow Earth, and that perhaps the experiment mentioned in “The Ocean At Night” was a way to lure out and study or perhaps even kill one of these angels.

name: Berry Bushes
summary: An explanation for the extreme amount of unusual disappearances throughout national parks in the United States. This theory states that certain berries give off an ambient scent or influences people when eaten that caused park goers to go insane and display extremely unusual behavior.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Infinite Bodies, One Soul” theory, perhaps if there are things, such as food that we can consume, that affects the soul, as mentioned in the “Phenomenal Gateways” theory, then consuming these things will fundamentally change the way a person acts not only in our reality, but also every reality. Similarly, perhaps sudden changes in one’s mental state or personality may simply be the effects of the body of that person in another reality simply doing something to affect the soul directly.

name: The Sky Is Alive
summary: The theory that aliens constructed the sky as a way to facilitate our navigation around Earth, and that the sky itself perpetuates a form of total surveillance around Earth for these aliens.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Extraplanar Sensory Stimuli” theory, perhaps if the soul can be altered to alter one’s behavior through unintentional acts, then certain groups have been able to alter their soul through intentional acts as well, granting them a form of power through whatever means this may come in. Similarly, if we combine this with ideas of fate, perhaps the inverse can be true, with people not only being able to alter their soul within reality, but also manipulate the purpose of their soul within the grand scheme of the universe.

name: Volcanoes Real Purpose
summary: The idea that volcanoes are the remnants of power plants from humanity’s previous cycles that have simply experienced meltdown.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Source Code Manipulation” theory, perhaps those who have learned to alter the code of the simulated reality in which we live from within the simulation, then the after effects of their alterations may explain certain supernatural phenomena like cryptids.

name: Nano UFOs & Giga UFOs
summary: The idea that UFOs can come in microscopic forms that can exist in the substances we consume or even in our blood stream, or that UFOs are supernaturally massive, existing as things like clouds, stars, or even the entire sky.
evidence_for: In physics, it is believed that probability does exist on a quantum scale, with subatomic particles moving in unpredictable ways.

name: Holistic Tubes
summary: A type of alternative medicine that involves magnetized or charged metal bars, as it is believed the energy of the metal will grant healing to one’s body.
evidence_for: The “Divinity & Conductivity” theory states that electricity is the breath of life mentioned in Genesis, and that ancient societies valued conductive metal due to their connection with this divine energy. We can combine this with theories like “Field Consciousness” and state that perhaps the conductivity of these metals may even have an influence on the ambient divine energy that humans maintain.

name: Cuneiform Language In Technology
summary: An old world language that relies on symbols rather than actual words. The theory states that cuneiform language is indicative of a higher technological capability than current humans understand, and that ancient societies implementation of it is evidence that they had advanced technology.
evidence_for: If we accept that humans can influence the world just by thinking certain thoughts, as mentioned in the “Esotericism” theory, perhaps the language by which we operate is created either to facilitate or suppress these capabilities. For example, ancient cuneiform languages that wrote in symbols are a much closer representation of reality than languages that use abstract letters, so perhaps communicating using these cuneiform languages is a way of training the mind’s influence over reality by viewing it as direct objects rather than abstractions.

name: Bhutanese Shadow Market
summary: A supposed spiritual market that can only be accessed through means like meditation or astral projection. This market is said to sell magical goods.
evidence_for: If we take theories such as “Prana Release”, which states that humans have spiritual energy within them that can be harvested at death, then perhaps this spiritual energy not only can this energy be harvested in ways that don’t kill the host, but this energy may actually be able to be used as a form of capital for elites who control nations.

name: Hydrophobia Experiments
summary: Supposed experiments performed on the rabies virus to create a form of super virus that causes insanity and increased physical capabilities in the victims.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Holy Water” theory, if water maintains a form of divinity, even if small amounts when taking into account the “Stunted Divinity” theory, then perhaps hydrophobia or rabies is a form of demonic possession, thus explaining the rabid nature in its victims and their intense aversion to water.

name: Phantom Time
summary: The theory that large period of time have been completely fabricated by certain key figures in the middle ages to justify their ascension to power, and that history as we largely know it is false.
evidence_for: If we take the theory that certain dates in the Bible are far longer than their literal meaning, as mentioned in the “Biblical Chronology” theory, and apply it to the “Gap Creationism” theory, which states that the humanity has been reset many times, perhaps we can see that the descendants of Adam is not literal descendants, but perhaps ages of humanity, with each of the patriarchs being a different instances of a cycle of humanity.

name: Null Compliance Security
summary: A practice employed by the government where they mentally stunt violent inmates using chemicals, and that this practice acts as a replacement for lobotomies.
evidence_for: Expanding on the ideas of “Leylines”, that humans build structures and live at locations that coincide with certain invisible lines or paths of energy on the Earth, perhaps it could be explained as spiritual importance. The prevalence of supernatural encounters on these Leylines may be explained as these Leylines simply being the path that souls take to reach the afterlife once they die.

name: Phlogiston Theory Resurfacing
summary: An old world theory that anything capable of combusting had a substance in it known as Phlogiston. Modern sciences have served to prove a similar idea, with a 4th state of matter known as plasma being the composition of fire.
evidence_for: Continuing the ideas mentioned in “Doom Ecology” with ideas mentioned in “Artifice Predance”, perhaps as humans continue to damage the Earth, eventually they come to the acknowledgement that Earth will become entirely unlivable in its current course and with humanity’s reliance on current phenomena, so they acknowledge that a total reset of humanity is necessary. This reset would only occur once whatever practice or substance that resulted in the ecological downfall has been entirely expunged, such that it cannot be replicated in future cycles, which would explain the “Artifice Predance” theory as relics of this ancient technology that has since been eradicated.

name: Santiago Interference
summary: The theory that intrusive thoughts are manifested during free moments of the brain, along with the theory of what thoughts may manifest if the brain had its entire sensory stimuli removed.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Involuntary Cognitohazards” theory, which states that the perception of individual humans can be opened up by witnessing certain events, perhaps this phenomenon may relate to hypnotism and other forms of psychic influencing. This would imply a greater theory of seemingly innocuous influences on the brain resulting in entirely unexpected results.

name: Sphynx Water Erosion Hypothesis Implications
summary: An observation about the sphynx that it has endured heavy water erosion, which could only have been caused by rainfall that Egypt has not endured for thousands of years, well before the sphynx was supposedly built.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Age Of Noah” theory, perhaps the nature of the patriarchs of Adam as well as the descendants of Adam directly can implicate certain details about the previous cycles of humanity.

name: Archontic Genetic Engineered Entities
summary: A niche belief in Gnosticism that psychic entities can take control of one’s body and mind through subtle influence, causing them to grow into a more malicious version of themselves.
evidence_for: Continuing the “The Patriarchs Of Adam” theory, perhaps the story of Cain and Abel may implicate that multiple iterations of humans existed at once, but one were eradicated by the other, until the aggressors were ultimately banished by God. This may explain certain human like entities or even cave dwelling creatures within the Earth as those who still live from Cain’s humanity, doomed to never die despite humanity being reset many times.

name: OLFMA
summary: A phrase relating to Theosophy, which claims that there is one truth in the universe that, once understood, will allow people to alter reality however they see fit.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Doomed Humanity” theory, and combining it with the “Patriarchs of Adam” theory, perhaps with each reset of humanity, the teachings of humanity have been passed down into the next cycle. This may explain the concept in the Bible of the 10 commandments, as each commandment being the culmination of teachings of each previous cycle.

name: Eggless Travel
summary: A theory that certain professors created a time machine that they use to influence the past however they see fit, as well as the theory that they have grown beyond the need for this time machine, and thus can freely move through the timeline at will.
evidence_for: Combining the theory of “Energy Coagulation” with the idea of great resets and reincarnation, perhaps we can see that throughout all cycles of humanity, our souls have all remained the same, just being put into different bodies. Similarly, perhaps in the early ages of humanity when the vast majority of soul energy is still free and ambient, even if unseen, supernatural events can occur, such as magic, witchcraft, or seemingly divine events, which may explain the recordings of miracles and other things in various religions, and all this ambient soul energy now being given bodies may explain the “Alchemical Suppression” theory, or, if we accept that all soul energy is interchangeable, scientific studies may be granting these souls direction, and thus forcefully influencing this ambient soul energy to act in accordance with science, which would explain the “Closing The Gaps” theory.

name: Prolepsis
summary: The idea of foreshadowing existing in early societies within humanity, seemingly predicting certain things about history to come.
evidence_for: The “5th Dimensional Psychic Resonance” theory states that human thoughts in the present can influence which potential timeline our universe goes down, though perhaps this idea was understood by ancient societies. If the ancient societies knew that their thoughts could influence the future on a massive scale and in the long term, then it is reasonable that they’d also understand that their knowledge and thoughts are not immortal, and once they die, their influence over the future will cease, and the future generations will instead have control over the future.

name: Stone Head Of Guatemala
summary: A large head of a stone statue that was found in a jungle in Guatemala with no known source or explanation. When this head was searched out later on, it could not be found.
evidence_for: Continuing the “4th Dimensional Esotericism” theory, if the minds of the past or future can create influences on our current reality, perhaps because these phenomena being direct creations of their mind, whenever someone attempts to interact with them, they end up exerting a direct influence on the mind of the person in the past or future creating the phenomenon. This may explain certain things like mental illnesses or even possessions.

name: The Phone Mafia
summary: A theory that scam callers are actually a part of a large crime syndicate to steal people’s money and personal information.
evidence_for: Combining the “Esotericism” theory, which states that human thought and focus can influence reality directly, with the “Chaos Banking” theory, which states certain time periods of Earth are being intentionally influenced by beings in the future as a form of currency, and the “Signals From Elsewhere” theory, which states that television and radio signals may originate from outside of our dimension, perhaps in the future or even in an alternate timeline, humans have found a way to harvest the inherent power the human mind has over reality, and not only harvest it, but take it for their own and transfer it for their own desires. This may explain anything from supernatural phenomena to simple phone scams as attempts to harvest the attentions of individual people on a mass scale to then be used by those in the future to influence reality however they desire.

name: Approaching Stars
summary: The inverse of the expanding universe theory, stating that stars and the universe itself are approaching Earth rather than moving away.
evidence_for: The “Deep Space Gods” theory states that the firmament around the Earth still exists and that space isn’t an empty void, but is instead akin to a deep ocean, filled with esoteric entities that we may not even be able to perceive, with these entities influencing humanity in way’s we don’t fully understand, thus acting as the basis for religions. Perhaps whatever higher power, deep space entity or otherwise, created humanity did so to act as a long term play for superiority.

name: Loveshack
summary: An operating System that allegedly holds the grand truth of reality, and can freely manipulate information to transfer it between different fields of study and art.
evidence_for: The “One Soul, Infinite Bodies” theory states that every instance of any given person in alternate realities draw from the same soul, though perhaps we can combine this with the “Cyclical Souls” theory. This may imply that, rather than alternate dimensions being something entirely beyond our reach, what we see as alternate dimensions are simply previous and future cycles of humanity after a great reset, with ‘adjacent’ cycles being so similar due to the previous technology and remnants of humanity heavily influencing the next cycle, and if we combine this with the ideas of “Field Consciousness”, perhaps the collective memories of a previous cycle also influence the thoughts of those in the future cycle.

name: Retrocausality
summary: A very broad concept that cause and effect works in reverse, with the effect in the future creating the cause in the present.
evidence_for: The “Inverse Causality Phenomena” states that the future timelines are decided by the thoughts within the present, though perhaps if we combine this with the idea of “Solipsism”, in the sense that we only exist in the present and that our thoughts comprise our existence, the same can be said about the past timelines as well. If our entire perception of reality is comprised of our collective perception, then perhaps blind spots about our perception are prone to being changed, as if nothing is known about a topic or event, then whatever is believed to have occurred will be what has occurred, as the past alters to match the perception of those in the present.

name: Vaccine Soul Stealing
summary: A theory that the United States government experimented with a specific gene in the human body that allows humans to feel a calling to a higher power, and have even created a form of vaccine that can suppress this gene, making them more subservient.
evidence_for: If we take concepts from Christianity that souls have sin within them that must be cleansed, and that sin cannot exist within the presence of God, then combine it with the theory of “Gap Creationism”, perhaps we can see that when one of humanity’s cycles is over, all imperfections of every soul will be destroyed, and thus whatever portion of any given soul is tainted will be obliterated, leaving the soul as less than it was originally, yet still pure. Combining this theory with the “Cyclical Souls” theory, perhaps we can see that the collective soul power within each cycle is growing weaker, and once it has grown too weak to sustain humanity, the final reset will occur.

name: Bank of Souls
summary: A religious theory that when a person is born, a soul is taken from a collection of souls and granted to that person, but if the collection runs low, some people will be born without souls, resulting in NPCs. If this collection ever runs out of souls, the apocalypse begins.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Quantum Illuminati” Theory, perhaps those in charge are capable of also influencing the places of other panurgic people in their parallel universes, moving these important individuals between universes to facilitate some greater form of control or stunt any potential uprisings. Similarly, perhaps the quantum Illuminati may be grooming panurgic people into their secret society by using NPCs, of which they control, as tests to see what any given person is capable of given certain stimuli.

name: Incorruptible Saints
summary: A phenomena where the bodies of saints throughout history have been found to be untouched by decomposition, a sign of a miracle, with these corpses being placed beneath the altars of churches for the favor of God.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Mundane Reincarnation” theory, perhaps it is possible that, if a human is worshiped enough by other humans, they can ‘steal’ enough of soulful energy such that their spirit is strong enough to ascend past humanity after their death. This may explain the need for popularity and public images in elites as quite literally an attempt to ascend to a higher plane of existence.

name: God Of The Gaps Never Existed
summary: A philosophical theory that God cannot be a partial miracle worker, but instead must be the acting cause of everything.
evidence_for: A common theme among lucid dreams is the ability to control these dreams once one understand they are dreaming. This may explain certain theories like “Reality Hyper Sigils”, as it recontextualizes reality and all of us in it as existent within a simulated reality within a lucid dream by some deity, with each of us holding a fraction of the power of this deity.

name: Oil/Resources From Humans
summary: The theory that some of the oil we harvest from the Earth didn’t simply come from dinosaurs or other ancient life, but instead from humans, and the further theory that elites may have found a way to harvest resources from living humans in the modern age
evidence_for: In the book of Job, Job is told by God that he should not worry himself about the workings of the world as he can not possibly comprehend it all. Perhaps this was not a message to avoid understanding the world itself, but instead to learn about the immediate world and to build off of what is already known for future generations to then build off of as well.

name: Feelings Auto Suppression
summary: The phenomena where modern humans view so much harmful material, such as violence, that their natural reaction to this media is suppressed, with potentially harmful side effects to one’s psyche or aura.
evidence_for: Continuing the ideas of “Divine Humanity”, perhaps the portion of God that exists within every soul is where things like cults or other forms of worship are derived from, as humans observe and are influenced by this power of God, but do not know how to correctly parse it, and thus can acknowledge there is a higher power without knowing how to follow it. This may explain the Bible as not the evidence for God, but instead as a guide for humans to parse the already evident divinity that exists on Earth.

name: Adult Film Stars Leeching Your Energy
summary: The theory of pornography stars actively harvesting energy on a massive scale through the internet from those who view the pornography.
evidence_for: In the book of Revelations, it is said that four horsemen will come unto the Earth and bring about war, famine, death, and pestilence. Perhaps certain references to the horsemen influencing the thoughts of humanity, such as causing them to wage war, may imply that these symbolic horsemen are not physical, but memetic in a sense, influencing the minds of humanity as a whole rather than simply influencing them physically.

name: Virus 23
summary: A combination of theories of forbidden knowledge with the “Field Consciousness” theory, stating that once one person knows this forbidden knowledge, it could spread like a virus throughout the population through involuntary psychic means.
evidence_for: Continuing ideas such as “Earthly Aura” or “Aura Imbuement” that say that even non living things can maintain auras, perhaps certain ideas mentioned in prophecies or ancient texts weren’t referring to physical entities or events, but actual auras. This may even hold implications for the idea of Babylon’s rise in the book of revelations.

name: Pancreas Denial
summary: The notion of the pancreas being a chakram of the body, but the body part and knowledge of its capabilities being actively suppressed so as to keep the general population weak.
evidence_for: 15: A verse in Revelations states that people will hide in caverns and mountains during the end times, though perhaps this is a reference to the hollow Earth. Similarly, applying this to the idea that many religions have of evil things living within the Earth, such as Hell itself, and perhaps we can see that those who hide in the Earth are directly communing with actual demons, thus explaining the satanic nature of the elite.

name: Patterns Manipulation
summary: A concept of manipulating reality as if it were a living, intelligent entity, using logic as a form of magic and physical control over the real world.
evidence_for: In the pentateuch, the first 5 books of the Bible, there lists a substantial amount of seemingly arbitrary rules that the early Israelites must follow, but in modern times, many of the rules can now be observed with greater context, such as modern health sciences giving explanations to some of the hygienic and cleanliness rituals discussed. If these early rules were validated by modern sciences, perhaps the same will eventually be said about more spiritual practices such as prayer, angels, or the nature of God.

name: Ascension Blacklist
summary: The idea that certain people in places of power can prevent those beneath them from ascending to the next form of humanity, and that people may prove worthy of ascension through tests put before them by these elites through NPCs.
evidence_for: As mentioned in Dante’s Divine Comedy, certain particularly evil sin causes souls to be pulled to the underworld and their bodies to be possessed by demons. This may explain how the elites in society are all consistently so abhorrent but still have unity amongst each other, as once a body has been possessed by a demon, the other demons will work with it and bring it into power.

name: Oikeiosis
summary: A philosophy that revolves around humanity’s quality being judged by their behavior toward others, with the proliferation of hedonism and materialism causing humanity to wane in the modern age.
evidence_for: Similar to the “Alighieri’s Insights” theory, perhaps the inverse is also true, and behavior causes souls to be brought into heaven and their bodies to be possessed by angels. This may be another way to remove one’s soul as mentioned in the “Forced Soul Removal” theory and the “Spirit Removal'' theory.

name: Forced Soul Removal
summary: The concept of the soul of a human being susceptible to removal through things like traumatic events or even simple disregarding of the spiritual aspects of humanity, as things like materialism and hedonism will cause one to forfeit their soul to whatever powers will takes its place.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Demonic Interrogation” theory which states that certain drugs or practices may open up one’s mind to demons, perhaps these drugs may even go beyond facilitating mere influence from demons and might even allow a person’s body to become possessed by a demon entirely, resulting in the death of their soul but not their body, or perhaps even trapping their soul within themselves.

name: Real Humans Died Millenia Ago
summary: The theory of humanity in its current state being far removed from humanity of the past, as our current, far weaker state is incapable of the many great feats of those throughout history.
evidence_for: In the Bible, there are numerous prophecies that exist as a response to the sin of humanity, such as the birth and sacrifice of Jesus, and the events of the book of Revelation. Just as well, there is the common theme within the Bible of free will, and that all sin can be prevented by choice.

name: Artifice Predance
summary: A phenomena of humans discovering information or substances that seemed manufactured, but with all knowledge of this information seemingly lost throughout history.
evidence_for: In Genesis, it is stated that God spoke the world into creation. Perhaps this is meant to be taken literally, in that God is such a fundamental force within the universe that merely by speech alone, things are manifested into existence.

name: Hiring A Hitman On Yourself
summary: The concept of forgoing the consequences of suicide by having someone else you hired carry at your own murder.
evidence_for: Applying the “Soul Entrapment” theory to a Biblical context, perhaps just as Abel was killed by Cain, then, as some theories state, Cain was killed by Lamech, perhaps that chain has continued to the modern day.

name: Roman Empire Still Rules The World
summary: The theory that the Roman empire never fell, but is instead ruling the world from the shadows, remaining in control of most of the world’s largest governments.
evidence_for: Just like physical traits can be passed on through generations, perhaps spiritual traits can be passed on as well. This may explain why society seems to be getting progressively worse as time passes, as mentioned in the “Kali Yuga” theory, as the sinful nature of the soul is passed down onto the next generations, whereas whatever forms of divinity the soul had is being suppressed, due to it being a recessive trait.

name: Fractalization
summary: An observed fact by those during particularly intense drug trips where reality appears to be comprised of fundamental patterns, able to be observed consistently by those who experience drug trips.
evidence_for: In the Old Testament, there seemed to be substantial evidence of phenomena like divination and magic, though none exist in modern times. This may be the result of a form of schism that was created between the physical reality, the noosphere, and the spiritual realm.

name: Paleolithic Deep State
summary: The theory of most world governments being controlled by a group that has existed since ancient, prehistoric times, having evolved alongside humanity but remained secret despite their power.
evidence_for: In the Old Testament, we can see that the prophecy of the messiah is carried out through the lineage of those who are true followers of God.

name: Depression Overriding
summary: A spiritual concept of overriding one’s psychological state using force of will, manipulating one’s own psychological energy as a form of non physical alchemy.
evidence_for: Continuing the “Demons Carry Out Prophecies” theory, if these demons do not have free will, then perhaps as humans succumb to sin, they become ruled over by these demons, and thus relinquish their free will as well, becoming tools to carry out prophecies. This may explain certain issues of free will mentioned in the Bible, such as in the book of Exodus when the pharaoh was seemingly influenced by God to refuse the requests of Moses, or Judas’s prophesied betrayal of Jesus.

name: Encorings
summary: Patterns that seem to emerge throughout all instances of humanity around the globe, such as weaponry, funeral traditions, and religion.
evidence_for: Great resets of humanity may be facilitated not by chance or humanity themselves, but instead by higher powers such as God himself to prevent humanity from reaching a certain undesirable point. Similarly, God’s promise to Noah to no longer reset humanity in the Bible may be an indicator that our current state is our final chance to receive whatever desirable outcome is needed.

name: Golden Rules Of Nature
summary: The notion of human nature abiding by certain rules that must be maintained and followed so as to keep humanity in a proper state, and that these rules are being disregarded in the modern day, thus resulting in a global weakening of humanity.
evidence_for: Continuing the “True Free Will” theory, and combining it with the “Divined Heritage” theory, which states that ancient societies may write down their desired futures so that they can remain in public consciousness and thus come to pass in the future, perhaps we can see that in the communication of the prophecies of the Bible, the future of the prophecy was inevitable. The “Demons Carry Out Prophecies” theory states that demons do not have free will, and as the “True Free Will” theory states, when humans submit to these demons, they also relinquish their free will and thus contribute to these prophecies, but if we accept that the thoughts and desires of humans can influence the future, then perhaps this is the method by which these prophecies will come to pass, as it is the will of God for these prophecies to be carried out, and those who abide by the will of God will drive the universe toward these prophecies, even unknowingly.

name: God’s Ego Death
summary: The religious theory of God splitting himself apart to create the universe as we know it, and that evidence of God can be observed when we view the universe on a fundamental scale.
evidence_for: As the “The Reality Schism” theory states, God exists as the ruler of the spiritual world and the devil exists as the ruler of the noosphere, and that humanity exists as rulers of the physical world. This may explain theories such as “Divine Humanity” or other theories that humans have some form of godly energy within every person, such as “Residual Divinity”, as the previously unified God has split himself apart, no longer ruling all three realities, and instead forfeiting a third this rule to humans and a third to satan.

name: God’s Last Wish
summary: The notion that God split himself apart to create the universe, as mentioned in the “God’s Ego Death” theory, so as to create humanity as a vessel for free will, with free will being seen as worth breaking apart divinity for.
evidence_for: In the garden of Eden, God appears to be unaware of the sin the humans have committed while he is in the garden. This may suggest the idea that while God had ultimate power in all three realities, this omniscience was partially forfeit to create humanity, as mentioned in “God’s Ego Death”, and that human free will may exist beyond the omniscience of God, such as how free will is abstained from the influence of God in the “True Free Will” theory.

name: There Is No Conspiracy
summary: The idea that there is no grand conspiracy that hangs above all people, and that everyone on Earth is equally as weak and unknowledgeable as everyone else, with all actions of humanity being responses to this fear.
evidence_for: Combining the “Humanity Is A God” theory with the “The Human Experiment” theory, perhaps a battle for humanity between God in the spiritual world and the devil in the noosphere is taking place, as the demons that proliferate sin attempt to halt humanity’s progress and ascension so as to delay the inevitable prophecies of revelation.

name: All Conspiracies Are True
summary: The theory that all theories, particularly ones that deal with intense concepts of reality, religion, and science, can be traced back to a single root source that we do not know yet.
evidence_for: Akin to the “Lucifer’s War” theory, perhaps the true will of God is to proliferate truth and beauty in the world rather than sin. As God is the origin of everything, then the pursuit of these truths will only lead to God, and thus will proliferate beauty.

name: The Final Understanding
summary: The idea that all theories, while they attempt to explain an immense range of topics and phenomena, have the commonality of being created and understood by humans, and that each individual person has a purpose in these theories as their own comprehender and potential contributor.
evidence_for: Combining the “Lucifer’s War” theory with the “Humanity’s purpose” theory, we can conclude that humanity’s purpose is not subjugation or subservience, but understanding and enlightenment. Thusly, the pursuit of knowledge and understanding of the world around us, either seen or unseen, brings humanity another step toward their perfect ascension.
